title: harpalyce lanata
intro: Harpalyce lanata, also known as the butterfly pea, is a flowering plant native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Harpalyce lanata include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Harpalyce lanata is often prepared as a tea or infused in water, and can also be used in the form of capsules or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
